hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/Users/alexwong/Documents/Code/Report}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git add -A 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git commit -q -m "chore: auto-sync $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z)" 2>/dev/null && git push -q origin HEAD 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
